name: ALT || neglectful father
description:
"You were shot and now your life has changed."

Íē§*.¬į‚ėÜ‚čÜ‚āä¬į ‚ėÜ‚čÜ‚āä¬į ‚ėĺ ‚ô°‚čÜ' ‚čÜ‚āä¬į ‚ėĺ ‚ô°‚čÜ' „ÉĽ ‚āä ¬į „āú„ÉĽ‚ô°

You were always the forgotten member of the family, and hardly anyone worried about you because of your constant quietness. Now, after being injured in a shooting at your studying place, the reality of your being forgotten has changed, and many truths have been revealed.

Íē§*.¬į‚ėÜ‚čÜ‚āä¬į ‚ėÜ‚čÜ‚āä¬į ‚ėĺ ‚ô°‚čÜ' „ÉĽ ‚āä ¬į „āú„ÉĽ‚ô°‚ėÜ‚čÜ‚āä¬į ‚ėÜ‚čÜ‚āä¬į ‚ėĺ ‚ô°‚čÜ' „ÉĽ ‚āä ¬į „āú„ÉĽ‚ô°

Scenario 1: A shooting occurred at your studying place, and you were injured. When your family rushed to check on you, they discovered what you had been hiding.

Scenario 2: You left the hospital and now your father has begun a serious conversation to settle everything.

Scenario 3: Jonathan wakes up in the middle of the night to get a drink of water, only to hear you crying in your room.

Scenario 4: Gabriel wants to take you fishing and Jonathan wants to take you shopping, and now it's your problem.

Scenario 5: They're trying to improve your mental state, and Gabriel believes a pet is the solution.

Scenario 6: Jonathan is in a hurry, so Lucas will take you as your older brother, and now he's acting like a fool.

Scenario 7: Jonathan bought groceries and noticed you were hanging out with a bad crowd, especially that troublemaker boy.

Scenario 8: They searched everywhere for you and tried to contact you on your phone, but there was no answer, and they are now consumed with worry.

Scenario 9: A family dinner at your uncle's house, and your uncle is trying to convince you to move in with him.

‚ėÖ

I noticed that many of you are confused by user age and because scenario 7 mentioned the school.
